meta.og:title: Use the D2L ePortfolio
meta.og:description: In this tutorial, learn how to use the D2L ePortfolio in your class to collect reflections, files and links, as well as share items with groups in your class.
meta.twitter:title: Use the D2L ePortfolio
meta.twitter:description: In this tutorial, learn how to use the D2L ePortfolio in your class to collect reflections, files and links, as well as share items with groups in your class.
meta.keywords: eportfolio, reflection, file, link, share, save, group, class
meta.description: In this tutorial, learn how to use the D2L ePortfolio in your class to collect reflections, files and links, as well as share items with groups in your class.

    <title>Use the D2L ePortfolio - Educational Technology - Toronto Metropolitan University (TMU)
    </title>
    
    <meta name="keywords" content="eportfolio, reflection, file, link, share, save, group, class">
    
    
    <meta name="description" content="In this tutorial, learn how to use the D2L ePortfolio in your class to collect reflections, files and links, as well as share items with groups in your class.">

					padding: 4px !important;
					position: absolute !important;
					transition: all .2s ease-in-out !important;
					z-index: 500 !important;
				}
				button.gifa11y-btn:hover, button.gifa11y-btn:focus {
					background: #002D72 !important;
				}

					box-shadow: 0 0 0 5px #00e7ffad !important;
					outline: 3px solid transparent;
				}
				.gifa11y-btn > svg {
					flex-shrink: 0 !important;
					position: relative !important;
					height: 24px !important;
					width: 24px !important;
					-webkit-transform: translate(0px,0px) !important;
				}
				/* Increase target size of button. */
				button.gifa11y-btn:before {
					content: "" !important;
					inset: -8.5px !important;
					min-height: 50px !important;
					min-width: 50px !important;
					position: absolute !important;
				}
				canvas.gifa11y-canvas {
					object-fit: contain !important;
					max-width: 100%;
				}
				.thumbnail > canvas, .thumbnail a > canvas {
					margin-left: auto;
					margin-right: auto;
				}
